title: [Bleeping Computer] KelpDAO suffers $290 million heist tied to Lazarus hackers

title: [Bleeping Computer] Seiko USA website defaced as hacker claims customer data theft
summary: The Seiko USA website was defaced over the weekend, displaying a message from attackers claiming they stole its Shopify customer database and threatening to leak it unless a ransom is paid. [...]
